item.title: Active Learning Identifies Sulfur‐Based Enhancers for Fe(III)‐Protoporphyrin Catalysis: Recapitulating Features of Natural Oxidase and Beyond
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Pengkun Su, Yue Zhan, Yuming Su, Zhiye Wang, Suyang Chen, Yibin Jiang, Huihui Hu, Cheng Wang
Advanced Materials, EarlyView.
